song.title: What is Living All About
song.lyrics: 1) What is living all about, Where’s the answer? Let’s find out! CALL, “Lord Jesus!” Taste and see! CHRIST becomes reality, LIFE He gives abundantly As a river flowing FREE. With a new LIFE we begin, JOY is springing from within, LOVE—He fills us to the brim! And it’s all because of Him! (Hallelujah)
